Stability fixes: bash replay loop sanitization, heavy-output cap, rewind/fork JSONL audit (filtered leaf candidates, malformed-line tolerance), event parser ghost-spinner fix
UX polish: Escape closes dialogs, Settings z-index over widgets, Jarvis send snapshot-before-clear, chat bg flicker fix via compositor promotion
